Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Reading]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Reading is a technique used by Calder to sense the ship and strengthen Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Reading is a technique used to ensure a ship accepts new additions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Reading is a technique used by Calder to focus his mind on an object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Calder uses the technique of Reading on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Reading is a technique used by members of the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Reading involves obscure information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder used the technique of Reading on the aura of the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Reading is a technique used by Readers to see visions of an object's creation or lifetime.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder has used a technique called Reading to see certain events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — The Reading can provide visions of past events.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Reading is a technique potentially used to keep the Council of Architects' ceiling in one piece.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Reading is a technique used to invest objects like Tristania's coat to stop bullets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Reading is a training specialty for Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Reading is a power that Lucan uses to see the history of objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Reading requires openness and emotional empathy.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Reading is a process that Calder experiences.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder has been Reading constantly to communicate with the Lyathatan and hold The Testament together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Reading is a sense Calder can extend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Calder uses Reading on Imperial relics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Reading is used to activate the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Reading is a technique used by the Gardener to press palms against stone tiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Reading can be used to temporarily Awaken stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Reading is a technique that can flood the mind with Intent.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Reading is a power used to see into the depths of human Intent and history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Reading is a technique used to perceive how others feel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Reading is a technique Lucan uses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Darius's Reading was brief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Ach'magut provided the education needed to advance Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor used the education provided by Ach'magut to build an empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Reading is a technique used to sense the Intent of a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Reading is a technique used to observe or understand things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Reading Elders directly is a great taboo that risks insanity due to facing alien minds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Reading is a process that ended for Shera.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr intends to use Reading to find the truth from Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Reading can be used to sense ambient Intent in surroundings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Reading is a technique that can be amplified by a device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — First generation Readers could use Reading to understand other languages by reading the Intent behind words.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Calder has the ability of Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Reading Great Elders directly can lead to an asylum.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Reading is a method of observing and understanding the nature of things like the ground, wind, or even hearts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Intent does not easily cling to liquid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Witnesses use Reading to inspect people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan wears a glove to stifle his Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Reading is a technique that can be used to detect traps or as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Loreli uses Reading to sense the air around her.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
